Piles represent the *abstract* dataset; exported piles the *finalised* one. - **Eval results**: once an evaluation is run, the results can be parsed into a human- and machine-readable eval result file. - You can also run `evalg table` to create a file with summaries from all eval runs. - **Templating**. You can see the `structs/sampletemplates` and `structs/templateextensions` folders in a post-`evalg init` folder to see available templating options. ## Quickstart ### CLI-only #### QA questions (free-form answer) Navigate to a folder and run `evalg init` if you haven't already. 1.
